scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @dash/shared build && concurrently -k -n shared,server,renderer,main -c cyan,blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @dash/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @dash/server dev" "pnpm --filter @dash/renderer dev" "pnpm --filter @dash/main dev"
scripts.package: pnpm build && node scripts/prepare-wincodesign.cjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
